title: Patagonia Trek — Group of 8
description: Eight adventurers tackled the W-Trek in Torres del Paine over 7 days. Stunning granite towers, glacial lakes, and the kind of camaraderie only the trail can forge. This was the trip that started it all.

title: Costa Rica Canopy Adventure — Group of 6
description: Zip-lining through cloud forest, soaking in Arenal hot springs, and white-water rafting on the Sarapiquí River. Six friends who came back as a family.

title: Solo Journey Through Japan
description: A solo traveler's dream — cherry blossoms in Maruyama Park, temple-hopping in Arashiyama, and late-night ramen in Dotonbori. Proof that solo travel done right is the most freeing thing in the world.
